title: [Transfers] What if my circumstance changes after I apply?
content:
**Q: What if my circumstance changes after I apply?**

If your situation, including changes to family composition, changes after you submit your transfer request you should immediately report the change to the Transfer Process Coordinator.If you are a victim of additional incidents in the case of domestic violence, civil rights problems or other threatening situations, you should contact the police at 9-1-1. You should also contact your housing manager or theOffice of Civil Rights.
